# Mentor Review Checklist

## Task Details

- Student:
- Issue:
- Pull Request:
- Date reviewed:

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Task matches issue scope.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are addressed.
- [ ] Code or documentation is readable.
- [ ] No secrets are committed.
- [ ] Naming is clear.
- [ ] Student explained testing or review steps.
- [ ] Feedback was provided constructively.
